CommunityApplications.Profile:
Personal **Unraid Docker template collection** maintained by [RapalS](https://github.com/RapalS) — one repository for every app template, not tied to a single product.
### What you get
- Installable Docker template XML under `templates/` (add more anytime; push to GitHub to publish) - Auto-generated template catalog: [TEMPLATE_INDEX.md](https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES/blob/main/docs/TEMPLATE_INDEX.md) - Authoring guides, validation scripts, and reference examples - Optional per-app setup notes under `docs/apps/` when a template needs extra context
### How to install
1. Unraid → **Docker** → **Docker Repositories** 2. Add: `https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES` 3. **Add Container** → pick any template from the dropdown
Or copy a single raw XML from the [template index](https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES/blob/main/docs/TEMPLATE_INDEX.md) to `/boot/config/plugins/dockerMan/templates-user/`.
### Support
- **Issues:** https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES/issues - **Docs:** https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES/tree/main/docs
Optional: add your Unraid forum support thread URL in the `Forum` element below before final CA submission.
### License
Repository contents (templates, docs, metadata) are licensed under the **MIT License** — an [OSI-approved](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) open-source license. Upstream container images remain under their own licenses.
